title: Duck Pond Day
subtitle: 水水去公园喂小鸭子和大金鱼
theme: 周末公园里的投喂与迷宫探险
moral: 亲近自然时要温柔观察、耐心分享；了解小动物吃东西的方式，也在探险中牵好手、勇敢探索。

pages.narration: 周末下午，天气特别棒。爸爸和水水准备去公园里喂小鸭子和大金鱼。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 小鸭子和大金鱼，我来啦！

pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view at home entryway, a taller white rabbit prepares feeding food on a small table: one old bread piece, one leftover sausage pancake piece, two vacuum-packed braised beef packets tucked into shuishui's sun-protection jacket pocket, and a water bottle; shuishui is excited beside a red panda, warm sunny afternoon

pages.narration: 带上水杯，水水和爸爸骑上黑色踏板摩托车出发了。

props: black step-through scooter with small red side trim panel

pages.composition_hint: three-quarter side view of a black step-through scooter with a small red decorative side panel; red panda sits on the rider seat holding the handlebars, shuishui stands safely on the wide front floorboard in front of the rider with both paws holding the handlebar area, not on rear seat, not sitting on handlebars; sunny residential road, slow safe start

pages.narration: 十字路口等红灯时，水水好奇地看着车把上的按钮。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 这个两个三角形的按钮是干什么的呀？

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 这是双闪灯。临时停在路边时，两个黄色转向灯会一起闪。

scene_state.location: 十字路口红灯前右侧车把特写
props: RIGHT handlebar control cluster based on hand-drawn reference
large upper horizontal three-position headlight slider labeled Auto On Off
bottom-left hazard light button with triangle icon
bottom-right green power button with lightning icon
red traffic light blurred in background

pages.composition_hint: extreme close-up of ONLY the RIGHT handlebar control cluster of a black scooter, matching a simple hand-drawn reference layout. The panel is a rounded rectangle near the right throttle grip. At the TOP is one large horizontal three-position headlight slider with tiny labels Auto / On / Off above it. At the BOTTOM LEFT is the hazard light button with a triangle warning icon. At the BOTTOM RIGHT is a GREEN power button with a lightning icon. A small white rabbit paw points to or presses the BOTTOM-LEFT hazard triangle button. Red traffic light softly blurred in the background. Crop tightly around the RIGHT handlebar buttons, throttle grip, mirror stem, and paw only; no left handlebar, no dashboard, no full bodies.

pages.narration: 绿灯亮了。爸爸慢慢开到十八公里每小时，水水按下定速巡航按钮，仪表盘两边的蓝灯变成了紫灯。

scene_state.location: 路口起步后的左侧车把和仪表盘特写
props: LEFT handlebar control cluster based on hand-drawn reference
middle large horizontal left-right turn signal rocker with left arrow and right arrow
bottom-left red horn button with horn icon
bottom-right cruise control button with speedometer icon

pages.composition_hint: extreme close-up of ONLY the LEFT handlebar control cluster plus part of the scooter dashboard, matching a simple hand-drawn reference layout. The panel is a rounded rectangle near the left grip. In the MIDDLE is one large horizontal left-right turn signal rocker with a left arrow icon on the left, a narrow central toggle, and a right arrow icon on the right. At the BOTTOM LEFT is a RED horn button with a horn icon. At the BOTTOM RIGHT is the cruise control button with a speedometer icon. A small white rabbit paw presses the BOTTOM-RIGHT cruise control button. Beside it, the dashboard display clearly reads 18 KM/H with purple light bars. Crop tightly around the LEFT handlebar controls, left grip, dashboard, and paw only; no right handlebar, no full bodies.

pages.narration: 不一会儿，就到了公园湖边停车场。水水先吃了一块卤牛肉，又喝了几口水。

props: small vacuum-packed braised beef packet in shuishui paw
pink-lidded water bottle held by red panda
small feeding food bag held by red panda

pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view at a park lakeside parking area, black scooter parked nearby; shuishui holds and eats one small vacuum-packed braised beef piece with her own paw, NOT hanging from clothing, no food attached to jacket; red panda holds a pink-lidded water bottle in one paw and a small feeding food bag in the other paw; lake trees in background, clear object positions

pages.narration: 来到湖边，爸爸和水水走上平铺玻璃的栈道。鸭妈妈带着一群小鸭宝宝游了过来。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸你快看，小鸭子来了！

props: flat glass walkway over lake edge

pages.composition_hint: three-quarter wide view on a flat glass walkway laid over the lake edge; shuishui and red panda stand on the transparent glass panels looking down and outward; a mother duck swims toward them with many tiny fluffy ducklings following in a neat group, clear lake water and distant reeds

pages.narration: 水水把面包掰成小块，轻轻往湖里扔。小鸭子游过来，吧嗒吧嗒吃了起来。
pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view from the glass walkway edge: shuishui breaks bread into small crumbs and gently tosses them into the lake; mother duck and tiny ducklings gather below eating the crumbs, red panda watches beside her, warm gentle feeding moment

pages.narration: 吃饱以后，鸭妈妈带着鸭宝宝往湖中心长满芦苇的小湿地游去。那应该就是它们的家吧。

props: mother duck and ducklings swimming away

pages.composition_hint: from behind shuishui and red panda on the glass walkway, looking across the lake as mother duck and ducklings swim away toward a small reed-covered wetland island in the lake center, peaceful afternoon water reflections

pages.narration: 这时候，游来了一大群金鱼。水水和爸爸一起扔面包屑，大金鱼大口大口地吃起来。
pages.composition_hint: high-angle medium view from above the glass walkway looking into clear lake water: a large school of big orange and gold fish gathers near floating bread crumbs, mouths open at the surface; shuishui and red panda paws visible at the walkway edge tossing crumbs, sparkling ripples

pages.narration: 突然，一只乌龟也游来了。它也想吃面包，可是速度没有金鱼快，试了好几口都没吃到。
pages.composition_hint: high-angle close-up looking into the lake water: a small turtle slowly reaches toward a floating bread crumb while fast big goldfish dart around and snatch nearby crumbs first; shuishui and red panda watch from the glass walkway edge, humorous but gentle nature moment

pages.narration: 栈道上飞来了几只小鸟，啄着掉在地上的面包屑。水水跑过去，小鸟却扑棱棱飞走了。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 我们离远一点，等它们回来。

pages.composition_hint: from behind shuishui on the flat glass walkway: shuishui runs forward toward several small sparrow-like birds pecking crumbs ahead, and the birds flap upward and fly away; red panda remains farther behind watching; clear glass panels underfoot and lake railing at the side; camera follows from behind shuishui, not a front view

pages.narration: 这一次，水水远远地把面包屑扔到小鸟旁边。小鸟跳跳地过来，叼起面包飞走啦。

scene_state.location: 玻璃栈道远距离喂小鸟

pages.composition_hint: three-quarter wide-medium view on the glass walkway: shuishui and red panda stay together at a respectful distance from several small birds far ahead; shuishui gently tosses a tiny bread crumb onto the ground near the birds from far away, one bird hops toward the crumb; make the distance clear, no crouching close to birds, lake railing behind

pages.narration: 喂完小动物，水水说要带爸爸去走迷宫。她东拐西拐，来到一条两边种着高高柏树的小道。

props: tall cypress hedges on both sides

pages.composition_hint: eye-level wide view at the entrance of a park maze-like path, tall cypress hedges on both sides forming green walls, several forked paths ahead; shuishui holds red panda's paw and leads him into the maze, mysterious but friendly afternoon light

pages.narration: 走着走着，他们遇到一个圆锥形的小土坡。土坡正面有一条直通顶部的石头楼梯。水水牵着爸爸的手，沿着楼梯爬了上去。

scene_state.location: 柏树迷宫里的圆锥形小土坡
props: straight stone staircase to the top
spiral gravel path wrapping around mound

pages.composition_hint: low-angle wide view of a cone-shaped earthen mound in the cypress maze, like a small conical hill with a flat circular top; on the front face is one straight stone staircase leading directly to the top; around the cone body, a separate spiral gravel path wraps downward; shuishui and red panda hold paws and climb up the straight stone stairs; cypress hedges around; not a tower, not a cylinder, not a vertical platform

pages.narration: 下来的时候，圆坛有一条螺旋路。水水和爸爸一圈一圈往下绕，绕了三四圈才回到地面。

scene_state.location: 圆锥形小土坡盘旋石子路近处中段
props: one visible curve of the spiraling stone path
curving low stone edge beside the path
sloped grassy earthen mound wall on one side
cypress maze greenery glimpsed in background

pages.composition_hint: STRICT medium shot at character height, camera standing ON THE SAME spiraling stone path halfway down the cone-shaped earthen mound, close enough to clearly see shuishui and red panda full bodies but NOT the whole mound. shuishui and red panda walk together on the curving stone path, holding paws; only one nearby curve of the path is visible behind and in front of them, with a low stone edge and sloped grassy earthen mound wall beside them. Cypress maze greenery is only a background glimpse. NO aerial view, NO bird's-eye view, NO high-angle map view, DO NOT show the whole cone mound, DO NOT show the straight staircase as the main subject.

pages.narration: 回家的路上，水水累了，不想站前面了。爸爸把水水抱到后座上，让她抱紧自己。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 累了就坐后面，抱紧我，我们慢慢回家。

props: black step-through scooter with small red side trim panel

pages.composition_hint: three-quarter side view of the black step-through scooter with small red decorative side panel; red panda rides slowly and safely, shuishui sits on the rear passenger seat behind him hugging his waist, no standing on floorboard in this return scene, warm late afternoon road

pages.narration: 风呼呼地吹，爸爸和水水一路聊天。水水大声喊：爸爸你说啥？听不见！回到家，她绘声绘色地给妈妈讲起公园里的故事。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 小鸭子来了，大金鱼也来了，还有迷宫！

pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view in the cozy living room after returning home, shuishui excitedly tells the taller white rabbit about feeding ducks, big goldfish, birds, and exploring the maze; red panda sits nearby smiling, water bottle and empty food bag on the table, warm evening light
